qa_pairs.question: What is the primary function of the Open Composer app within the Trillium Open OnDemand service?
qa_pairs.answer: The Open Composer app provides a suite of Slurm job template scripts that can be submitted directly to the Trillium scheduler, and it also offers an interface to monitor submitted jobs via the 'History' tab.

qa_pairs.question: How do users access the Open Composer app on Trillium?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can access Open Composer by navigating to the '''Jobs''' drop-down menu and selecting '''Open Composer''' or by clicking on one of the Slurm job templates, such as '''MPI Slurm Job''', '''OpenMP Slurm Job''', or '''Hybrid MPI/OpenMP Slurm Job'''.
